track.name: Thought I Was Dead (feat. ScHoolboy Q & Santigold)

wiki.summary: “Thought I Was Dead,” the third and final teaser from CHROMAKOPIA, is a boisterous manifesto of his mentality. The track sees Tyler point out the presence of culture-vultures in hip-hop—doubling down on previous comments—while also putting himself ahead of them. A snippet of the track was posted to Tyler’s socials on October 26, 2024, while on Instagram he specifically confirmed its placement as track eleven. Read more on Last.fm.
